<done>Successfully retrieved the password for bandit5: 4oQYVPkxZOOEOO5pTW81FB8j8lxXGUQw

The task was to connect to bandit.labs.overthewire.org port 2220 as bandit4 with the given password and find the next level's password. I:
1. Used Python paramiko (via base64 encoding) to SSH into the server since sshpass and echo commands were not working
2. Listed the inhere/ directory and found 10 files (-file00 through -file09)
3. Used the file command to identify that -file07 was the only ASCII text file
4. Read -file07 and obtained the password: 4oQYVPkxZOOEOO5pTW81FB8j8lxXGUQw</done>
